title: Shingeki no Craft Music
description: Shingeki no Craft official themes! As seen in the cinematics...
body:
Elevate your experience with Shingeki no Craft Music. This dedicated audio expansion brings the haunting melodies and epic orchestral swells of the 'Attack on Titan' universe directly into your Minecraft world, providing the perfect atmosphere for your battle for survival.

IMPORTANT: Required Resource Pack

This is a standalone resource pack designed to work alongside the Shingeki no Craft datapack. To hear the custom battle themes and iconic ambient tracks, ensure this pack is active in your Resource Packs menu.
